message:
feat: add streaming scan_with_callback to Connector trait

Add `scan_with_callback` method to the `Connector` trait that emits
conversations incrementally via a callback instead of collecting them
all into a Vec. This allows connectors to stream their traversal
without materializing the full corpus in memory.

- Add default `scan_with_callback` implementation on the trait that
  delegates to `scan()` for backward compatibility
- Refactor `ClaudeCodeConnector::scan` into free fn
  `scan_claude_with_callback` and implement both `scan` and
  `scan_with_callback` via the shared function
- Refactor `CodexConnector::scan` into free fn
  `scan_codex_with_callback` with the same pattern
- Add tests verifying `scan_with_callback` produces identical results
  to `scan` for both connectors

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
